urdu transliteration text: Pardes me gar lutwaake, par tera din bachaake
english translation text: I have lost my household in a foreign land, but saving your religion…

urdu transliteration text:
Me shaam chali nana
I am going to Shaam (Damascus)

english translation text:
I am going to Shaam,
I am going to Shaam

urdu transliteration text: Be goro kafan bhayi hai mera, asbab luta hai gar bhi jalaa
english translation text: My brother is without a shroud – our belongings were looted and our tents were burnt

urdu transliteration text: so teer ghamo ka kha ke, ankho se khun bahaa ke
english translation text: It is as if I have been pierced by hundreds of arrows – I am shedding tears of blood…

I am going to Shaam,
I am going to Shaam

urdu transliteration text:
Bhayi ka gala kat te dekha, kasim ka badan pamaal
I saw my brother’s neck being slit, and also Qasim’s body being trampled
akber ka dard utha ke, hatho me rasan bandh waake,
english translation text: Carrying the grief of Ali Akbar, with hands tied in ropes

I am going to Shaam,
I am going to Shaam

urdu transliteration text: Ghazi ke baad me ghazi hu, me nade ali dohraati hu
english translation text: After the martyrdom of warrior (Abbas), I am the warrior of the caravan, reciting Naadi Ali

urdu transliteration text: khutbo ki teg chalaake, ghazi ka alam lehraake,
english translation text: I am attacking them with my sermons and waving the flag of Abbas

I am going to Shaam,
I am going to Shaam
